name: Dick Berk
abstract: Richard Alan Berk (May 22, 1939 – February 8, 2014) was an American jazz drummer and bandleader.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gafa
about_quotes.evidence: We brought in Larry Willis on piano, Earl May on drums, and the drummer at that time was Dick Berk. ... And so Dick Berk was with us
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gafa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2023
